iti62:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti62:1.3:
"There are these three faculties. Which three? The faculty of 'I am about to know what is not yet finally known,' the faculty of final knowledge, the faculty of one who has finally known.
These are the three faculties."
iti62:1.4: For a learner in training along the straight path: first, the knowledge of ending; then, immediately, gnosis;
iti62:1.5: Then, from the ending of the fetter — becoming — there's the knowledge, the gnosis of one released who is Such:
iti62:1.6: One consummate in these faculties, peaceful, enjoying the peaceful state, bears his last body, having conquered Māra along with his mount.
iti62:1.7: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
